entry.title: Key Highlights of the New Income Tax Bill, 2025
entry.summary: The new bill aims to simplify direct tax law, making it easier to read, understand, and implement for taxpayers and professionals alike.

entry.title: GST 2.0: Major Reforms on the Horizon
entry.summary: "GST 2.0" aims to simplify the tax structure by reducing tax slabs and streamlining compliance, potentially boosting economic growth.

entry.title: TDS and TCS Changes from April 2025
entry.summary: Significant changes in TDS and TCS provisions will come into effect, aiming to reduce compliance burdens while ensuring better tax collection.

entry.title: Clarity on Income from House Property
entry.summary: The revised Bill has clarified key provisions related to calculating income from house property, providing much-needed clarity for taxpayers.

entry.title: Upcoming GST Compliance Changes in 2025
entry.summary: Businesses need to be aware of several changes, including mandatory multi-factor authentication (MFA) and enhanced e-invoicing requirements.

entry.title: S&P Upgrades India's Sovereign Credit Rating
entry.summary: S&P Global Ratings has raised India's long-term sovereign credit rating to "BBB" from "BBB-", citing strong economic fundamentals and growth prospects.
